summary: Design the media/gossip rung (cut 1) — grounded panel, six design lenses, adversarial critics, synthesis
logs: Grounding: 5 readers over code seams + authority docs
Design panel: 6 lenses, critics pipelined behind each

grounding_constraints: Gossip must replace the propagation model BEHIND the existing accessor signature `World::route_evidence(reader: CraftId, route: usize) -> u32` — it takes the READER by design so call sites never change (crates/jumpgate-core/src/world.rs:495-504).

Evidence-only storage: the store records rob TICKS (who/what/when), never decayed scores; staleness/decay must remain a property of the READ, not the store (world.rs:33-39 doc + count_recent at world.rs:40-46). Heat scores / threat tags / confidence scalars in the store violate the seam contract.

RouteEvidence is HASHED state (HASH_FIELD_ORDER word 29, HASH_FORMAT_VERSION=4, GOLDEN_ZERO_STATE_HASH=0xafdc_5c35_6266_0ff0 re-pinned at v3->4; hash.rs:64-73,106-114,278-279). Any change to evidence storage shape = format bump + golden re-derivation via print_golden in its own single-cause commit.
Any new randomness needs a NEW RngStream variant with a NEW fixed salt; existing variants/salts are append-only and untouchable (rng.rs:17-33).

Pirate brains must stay evidence/traffic-blind: `relocate_lurk_target`'s geometry-only signature is the enforcement mechanism (pirate.rs:339-351, test relocation_respects_reach at pirate.rs:1301-1357); routing gossip into pirate target choice requires changing that type and reverses the interdiction-equalizer lesson.

The only hauler decision that can consume gossip today is the ASSIGN contract pick (economy.rs:545-567), gated by trophic.hauler_belief_scoring (default false); there is no in-flight detour mechanism — a detour-vs-cargo-value behavior needs a new decision surface, not a new score on the existing one.
The penalty clamp (min(...,900), economy.rs:561) means evidence AVOIDS routes, never erases them — score never reaches zero; preserve this avoid-not-erase property.

info_tick refresh runs only when engage_radius_au > 0.0 (world.rs:825,840-852): the whole evidence/info machinery rides the trophic inert lever, and engage_radius_au=0.0 default scenarios must stay bit-identical (test default_engage_radius_is_inert, pirate.rs:863-885).

Gym obs must carry RAW evidence, never route_evidence counts or derived scores — 'the agent derives route danger from contacts + geometry' (world.rs:530-537 doc on pirate_contacts); route_evidence is currently absent from all obs (jumpgate-py/src/env.rs:1050-1054).
risk_appetite (stores.rs:185-187) is retired-but-hashed dead state (word 25); a gossip design must not revive per-craft taste scalars, and removing the column is itself a hash-format golden change.
RouteEvidence is sized ONCE at reset from n_stations² (world.rs:323-331) — 'no mid-run station spawn in v1'; a gossip store keyed by stations inherits this fixed-at-reset sizing assumption.

Destination-dock sanctuary is an ORDERING property (3b deliveries before 3b2 encounters, pirate.rs:11-19, test dock_is_sanctuary_at_destination pirate.rs:1093-1156); gossip stages must not be inserted between 3b and 3b2 in a way that breaks it.

Stage cadence facts a design must respect: pirate brain = every tick pre-physics (stage 1c2); encounters/population = every tick post-physics (3b2/3b3); hauler ASSIGN = staggered tick%stagger_period==row%stagger_period (economy.rs:503-510); pirate relocation eligibility = tick%relocate_period==row%relocate_period only when hungry (pirate.rs:501-507).

Notoriety is per-pirate INTERNAL state driving lie-low (stores.rs:100-103, pirate.rs:579-585) — it is not published anywhere; a gossip channel exposing pirate identity/heat would be a NEW channel and must go live with its generator per project law (no police gossip before police).
Writes happen at robbery settlement only — DrivenOff leaves no evidence trace (pirate.rs:243-250); 'evidence' currently means successful robs, not encounters.

HASH_FIELD_ORDER is APPEND-ONLY: a gossip_buffer store appends NEW words after word 29, bumps HASH_FORMAT_VERSION 4->5, and re-pins BOTH state goldens via the ignored print_golden test — literals are never invented (hash.rs:42, hash.rs:104-114, hash.rs:951-956, hash.rs:1001-1059 manual_zero_fold must gain the new words too).

The fold for any new store must be a pub(crate) write_* helper called from BOTH state_hash and the test parity recompute (recompute_with_cursors), plus per-field 'moves!' completeness tests — the write_route_evidence/state_v4_columns_are_folded pattern (hash.rs:449-463, hash.rs:866-937).
Option-typed columns fold self-delimitingly, discriminant tag BEFORE payload; payload growth is appended INSIDE the tag-1 arm (hash.rs:57-62, hash.rs:316-331).

RngStream::Media = an APPENDED enum variant with a NEW fixed 64-bit salt constant; existing variants/salts untouched; streams seed master ^ salt as separate ChaCha8Rng instances, never off a shared parent (rng.rs:18-34, rng.rs:61-67).

Media draws must sit at a fixed World::step stage, iterating hashed state in dense-row order, gated by an inert-default config lever so default worlds consume ZERO Media draws — that is what makes the unhashed stream cursor Class-3 transitively-pinned and keeps every existing replay bit-identical (hash.rs:81-93, world.rs:333-343, world.rs:644, world.rs:825, config.rs:230-232/287).

New TrophicCfg/MediaCfg knobs hit the exhaustive-destructure compile error until folded at the config-hash TAIL; GOLDEN_CONFIG_HASH is re-pinned via print_golden_config — a config-shape golden commit SEPARATE from the state-shape golden commit (single-cause each) (config.rs:444-461, config.rs:560-620, config.rs:661, config.rs:929-932).

Every new CraftStore column must be initialized in BOTH CraftStore::push and World::reset's manual mint loop, staying length-parallel (slot==row, no despawn) or state_hash's dense-row unwrap panics (stores.rs:248-275, world.rs:200-262, world.rs:238-240).

World-level stores are sized ONCE at reset (no mid-run station spawn in v1); a per-node gossip buffer must be bounded and reset-sized like RouteEvidence's n_stations^2 rings (world.rs:22-24, world.rs:324-331).

There is no serde/persistence: a gossip buffer must be a pure function of (config, command log, RNG streams) because replay rebuilds via World::reset + re-fed ActionLog and asserts per-tick hash equality (replay.rs:1-18, replay.rs:72-90).

Evidence store discipline: store raw claim data (e.g. rob Ticks), NEVER pre-decayed/scored values — staleness is computed at the READ from the reader's info_tick (world.rs:33-47, world.rs:493-513); accessors expose raw evidence, never derived danger scores (world.rs:531-541).

Transient intent columns (the pending_upgrade pattern) must be written and fully consumed within ONE tick; state_hash debug_asserts emptiness at every hash point (stores.rs:198-203, hash.rs:281-287, world.rs:657-694).

Stage order is load-bearing and documented in-place: rob evidence is written at stage 3b2 (after 3b deliveries — destination dock = sanctuary by ordering, before 3c failures); info_tick refreshes in the same gated block; a gossip-write stage must declare and justify its position the same way (world.rs:812-825, world.rs:839-851).

Unhashed runtime-mutable state may exist ONLY as: prev_* transitively-pinned snapshots, DERIVED pure-function caches (mods), same-tick transients, or diagnostics that are never behavior inputs (engagement_diag) — a hashed-input gossip buffer fits none of these and MUST be hashed (stores.rs:147-173, world.rs:67-71).
New sweep knobs need apply_knob match arms; unknown knobs are hard errors (scenario.rs:255-315).
Reset-time randomness (e.g. initial gossip seeding) draws from the named stream in dense-row order under the same inert gate, exactly like the pirate lurk scatter (world.rs:333-379).

Events are NOT part of state_hash and replay records (tick, state_hash) only — new media EventKind variants are hash-neutral, but any new HASHED knowledge/media STATE is a state-shape change requiring its own single-cause golden commit (contract.rs:97-98; trophic_run.rs:300-323 replay-check).

Single emit path, no reactivity: emitting an event cannot trigger another same-tick event (events.rs:96-98, events.rs:1-5). Gossip propagation must be a staged world-step mechanic reading prior state, never an event-handler cascade.

EventStream is unbounded full-run retention with no pruning (events.rs:19-38; no truncate/drain/clear anywhere in world.rs); the chronicle reads recent_events(Tick(0)) at run end (trophic_run.rs:185). High-rate per-tick gossip events would bloat both memory and chronicle watchability — media events should be edge/boundary-shaped like the existing detectors (events.rs:49-51 fuel edge, 92 arrival latch).

Event payloads carry claims only — IDs, ticks, integer micros/milli magnitudes; no confidence, heat, or threat fields exist anywhere in the catalog (contract.rs:45-139). Media records must keep this shape (EVIDENCE-NOT-VALUATIONS).

Events carry no position; the only spatial join is route_of(contract) which fails (None) once the contract leaves the dense store (diagnostics.rs:383-394). A knowledge-front truth join done after the fact must either add 'where' to generator payloads or join in-window while contracts resolve — sample_window already demonstrates the in-window pattern (diagnostics.rs:298-332).

TrophicSample is integers-only by doctrine ('hash-adjacent evidence, never float analytics', diagnostics.rs:40-41). Knowledge-front fields must be integer (lag ticks, counts, milli-fractions) and per-window, sampled at window close (diagnostics.rs:44-45).

classify() is pure over samples and its thresholds are explicitly designer windows, not gates (diagnostics.rs:18-21, 1-6); verdict precedence is PermanentPeace > NoCycle > RiskEqualized > DecisionNotTranslating > Alive (diagnostics.rs:130-140) — a media verdict arm extends this matrix as diagnosis vocabulary, never as an acceptance bar (PDR-0006).

The PermanentPeace-precedence lesson is the positive-control discipline in code: a surface oscillation can be a false witness once the underlying coupling is dead (diagnostics.rs:126-130, test 472-480). A media instrument needs the analogous override (e.g. gossip volume oscillating over a dead information field is not 'alive media').

The sweep's RESULT_RE is fully anchored ^...$ (sweep_trophic.py:34-39) against the exact println at trophic_run.rs:276-289 — any new RESULT field breaks every sweep; runner and aggregator must change in lockstep. JSONL is safer: python indexes by key (sweep_trophic.py:79, 85, 118), so additive keys in sample_json (trophic_run.rs:122-141) don't break existing panels.

chronicle_subject defaults all future EventKind variants to skipped (`_ => None`, trophic_run.rs:162) — media events are invisible in chronicles until an explicit arm is added; the repeat-collapse exists because watchability noise is a real failure mode (trophic_run.rs:167-170, the seed-7 Arrival-spam lesson).

Every spec-§9 knob rides apply_knob / --set (trophic_run.rs:70-76, 93-96) and unknown knobs abort a sweep (sweep_trophic.py:21-23, 67-70); media tuning knobs must join this surface so the grid + an instrument-kill control (cf. reach=inf must read RiskEqualized, sweep_trophic.py:219-227) cover them.

Sampling window semantics are (window_start, tick]: sample_window reads recent_events(window_start+1) and the engagement filter is tick>window_start && <=tick (diagnostics.rs:298, 372-377); runner samples when t % WINDOW_TICKS == 0 then advances window_start (trophic_run.rs:109-116). Media counters must use the same half-open convention or windows will double-count.

FLAT-BUFFER FFI: the native env writes one contiguous f32 obs buffer per step (gym_env.py:1-7, 55-63; env.rs:779-799). A variable-length comms log must be fixed-K slots with presence flags inside that flat buffer (the pirates-block precedent, obs.rs:206-264) — a Dict obs space means MultiInputPolicy AND a new FFI contract, neither exists today.

APPEND-ONLY OBS EVOLUTION: new blocks append after dim 19/33 leaving the base block unchanged, and the feature-off case must be byte-identical to the prior env (test_trader_pirates_mode.py:76-91 asserts num_pirates=0 == no-kwarg env, obs AND stepping).

REWARD IS Δcredits ONLY: env.rs:1123-1124 computes reward as credit delta in credits; test_trader_pirates_mode.py:116-150 asserts the reward==Δcredits identity every macro-step — a media block may change OBS only, never add a reward term.

EVIDENCE-NOT-VALUATIONS already enforced at the accessor: world.rs:531-537 docs say NEVER route_evidence counts or derived scores in contacts; obs.rs:231-234 'RAW evidence only ... never a route score'. A comms-log obs must carry claims (who/what/where/when/magnitude), no heat/threat/confidence scalars.

STATIONARY-OBS LAW is implemented as fixed compile-time scale constants (obs.rs:152-159 trader; obs.rs:219-225 pirates) with NO VecNormalize (train_trader.py:2-5, 85-92); any age feature must be raw log-scaled (the log1p(d/ref)/scale pattern at obs.rs:253 is the template), never pre-decayed (route_evidence ring: 'EVIDENCE ONLY, no decay arithmetic', world.rs:35).

CONTACT SLOTS ARE NOT IDENTITY-STABLE: pirate_contacts sorts by distance every call (world.rs:547-556), so obs slot k can be a different pirate each step. Per-episode-stable entity-slot embeddings require the env to emit identity (CraftId.slot exists and is episode-stable, ids.rs:1-11) or re-order by dense row — an obs-layout change with its own dim bump.

SB3 PPO MlpPolicy + Discrete(5) is the whole training stack (train_trader.py:89-91, gym_env.py:69-77); action space was deliberately NOT extended for pirates ('no purchase actions this rung', gym_env.py:35-38, env.rs:690-697) — media must not silently grow it; any LSTM/attention head needs a demonstrated expressiveness gap first (no-shaping keystone).

SEED HYGIENE: training seeds 50_000+idx via FreshSeedOnReset (train_trader.py:43-48), held-out eval 10_000..10_024 (baselines.py:19, eval_pirates_ablation.py:45-46); new media randomness must come from a NEW RngStream with a new fixed salt drawn at World::reset (the Piracy-stream lurk-draw precedent, env.rs:288-293), never Python-side RNG in the world.

ABLATION = REPORTED NEVER GATED (PDR-0006): eval_pirates_ablation.py:1-22 hard-codes the header and protocol; a media ablation must zero-mask its appended dims in BOTH the training wrapper (lines 49-59) and at eval predict (97-99), exploiting that zeroed == masked-absent is in-distribution.

SEMI-MDP TIMING: one step = one decision; accept macro-steps span variable ticks (idle-loop, env.rs:1100-1121) and the pirates horizon is 5000 ticks ~= 6-10 decisions (env.rs:241-244) — a comms log sampled only at decision points sees the world at trader-decision cadence, not tick cadence; dock-gated info (route_evidence info_tick, world.rs:500-513) is the existing in-fiction staleness mechanism.

AUTO-RESET CONTRACT: the native env auto-resets on truncation and overwrites obs with the NEW episode's initial obs while flags report the old episode (env.rs:1130-1138); episode-scoped media state (logs, embeddings) must be cleared inside reset_trader_episode (env.rs:992-1001), not in Python.

CHANNELS LIVE WITH GENERATORS: the only evidence generators that exist today are pirate contacts (live pirates, world.rs:541) and robbery route-evidence rings (world.rs:504); there are no police, no other traders' reports — a gossip channel cannot precede its generator.

PDR-0006: media's value is judged by the play it produces, never by an information-room/belief-state-ceiling measurement; metrics are windows, ablations reported not gated (0006-*.md L32-36, L43, L48; pirates spec L13-19, L468-473)

Channels live WITH their generators — 'Media engine → after pirates are alive'; no channel for events no generator emits (pirates spec §13 L499; concept note L8-9 'NOT part of the first full-info cut')

Evidence-not-valuations: world state holds evidence only (who/what/where/when/claimed-magnitude); stored decayed risk scalars/heat scores are rejected valuations; staleness is a property of the READ not the store (pirates spec §7 L335-341, L353-355; events L170-172)

Media must replace the propagation model BEHIND the existing reader-parameterized signature World::route_evidence(reader, route) — the documented 'degenerate proto-channel' seam (pirates spec L349-352); dock-gated info_tick desynchronization is load-bearing for the boom/bust cycle (L356-359)
No global oracle / uniform lag: a synchronized prey response is equalization one level up — information must stay sparse/local/lossy and per-craft positioned (pirates spec L40, L338-340, L342-347)

Determinism: media must be a seeded integer epidemic (concept note L36); any state-shape change = single-cause golden commit with print_golden-derived literals (HASH_FORMAT_VERSION=4 at hash.rs:108, goldens at hash.rs:114 / config.rs:661); new randomness = new RngStream salt, existing salts untouched (pirates spec §8 L384-388)

Reward stays currency-only for DRL players; legal heat/reputation/fear price themselves through consequences, never reward terms (pirates spec §14.9 Reconciliation 1, L595-599); RL obs carry raw evidence/contacts, never route_evidence counts or any score (L353-355, L459-463); fixed compile-time scales, no VecNormalize (L463)
No per-craft taste scalars; heterogeneity comes from state (position, wealth, escort level, dock-refreshed evidence) — the risk_appetite ghost is retired (pirates spec L59-61, L600-602)

First-class goods provenance (stolen_from tag) is the banked hook media gossip and police seizure key off — media design must not foreclose it; Resource stays append-only (pirates spec §14.6 L529-540)

Narrative quarantine + state surgery are FUTURE: non-deterministic narrative content goes behind the recorded ingest seam (record-at-injection ⇒ replay-from-record); design must not block these seams but must not build them (pirates spec §14.3 L512-516, §14.4 L517-521, §8 L397-401)

Fleet-ledger caveat (§15.3 L618-622): no fleet-as-level abstraction lingering past its due date; any media simplification must likewise name its sunset — 'an abstraction without a written deepening path is a bug' (L576-577)

Capability mixins pattern: media-relevant capabilities (broadcast towers, Q-ship capability-claims-vs-truth deception) compose as Option-columns on positioned entities, not new entity types (pirates spec §14.8 L557-565)

Information friction must keep geography legible and consequential — features that frictionlessly dissolve the Newtonian constraint (e.g. instant global knowledge) are suspect (vision.md L26-37); DO-NOT-BUILD-IN-V1 watch-list items (observation compiler etc.) need an ADR (vision.md L58-63)

Resist building the full media engine: the concept note itself mandates the minimal version (media-observability-engine.md L44-45); crimes.md is advisory raw material, authoritative only as filtered through §14.9's adoptions/reconciliations

panel_summary.scope: Cut 1 builds the deterministic epidemiology substrate: a hashed, bounded, integer GossipItem store on every station (reservoir) and every craft (vector), populated by exactly one generator (Robbed settlements, minted into the victim's buffer at the existing evidence-ring write site in pirate::resolve_encounters), propagated exclusively by dock contact inside the existing stage-3b2 info_tick refresh loop (ship→station then station→ship, per-item significance-proportional transfer draws on a new RngStream::Media), with deterministic per-hop magnitude inflation, seeded per-hop pirate-identity decay (the first (truth,cover) divergence), and significance-weighted eviction with explicit tie-breaks. World::route_evidence(reader, route) is reimplemented over the reader's personal buffer behind its unchanged signature, making lag/locality/loss physical instead of simulated; the scripted hauler ASSIGN belief-scoring is the live consumer. RouteEvidence rings keep being written as the media-off fallback with a named cut-2 sunset. Hash format goes 4→5 (words 30-32), config gains a MediaCfg with eight knobs on apply_knob, all inert by default (zero Media draws, default worlds bit-identical post-re-pin). Truth joins live in an unhashed media_diag (mint provenance + transfer log) feeding additive JSONL keys — the knowledge-front instrument. No gym obs export, no reward change, no new EventKind, no pirate read path.
critical_findings: SELF-AVERAGING via per-tick transfer retry: hanging the exchange off the per-tick info_tick refresh loop turns 'significance-proportional transfer' into near-certain transfer for everything above the floor, collapsing the LOSSY leg of sparse/local/lossy. The proposal says "propagated exclusively by dock contact inside the existing stage-3b2 info_tick refresh loop" and "Per candidate item: ... Transfer draw ... u < sig_milli". Verified in code: the loop at world.rs:839-851 runs EVERY TICK for every craft within ARRIVAL_RADIUS — there is no dock-arrival edge. A craft dwelling N ticks at a station gets N independent Bernoulli trials per un-held item: at sig=500 (a ransom-cap rob) transfer is ~certain in 2-3 ticks; even the 50-milli floor reaches 64% over a 20-tick dwell. Every dock becomes a near-full database union-merge, stations converge to the union of all news, and readers differ only by last-dock time — which is structurally the OLD single-reservoir+info_tick model with extra ceremony. The proposal's own reach law gives it away: "P(escape station) = 1−(1−p)^(visits within retention)" — 'visits' in the formula, but the implementation as specified trials per TICK. This is the contention-game NO-GO mechanism (self-averaging field) rebuilt one layer up.

panel_summary.scope: Cut 1 replaces the global-oracle RouteEvidence read with a deterministic, integer, ship-borne gossip epidemic over the existing 6-station trophic console world: robbery victims seed rob-claim rumors into their own comms-log; rumors transfer station<->ship on dock-edge contact with significance-weighted probability (RngStream::Media), inflate per hop (the big-score wrinkle, magnitude-only — identifiers stay TRUE in cut 1), and are forgotten by bounded significance-weighted-age eviction. The ONLY consumer is the existing hauler ASSIGN belief-scoring (economy.rs:546-567), now reading the hauler's own log behind the unchanged World::route_evidence(reader, route) signature; pirates stay gossip-blind (geometry + hunger only). This closes the hauler-information half of the boom-bust loop (rumor empties a lane -> pirates starve via the EXISTING hunger relocation -> rumors age out -> haulers return), watched through new RumorPlanted chronicle lines, per-route station-awareness JSONL fields, and a truth-join inflation readout. Console + diagnostics only: zero gym/obs changes, zero reward changes, two single-cause golden commits (state-shape word 30-32 / HASH_FORMAT_VERSION 5; MediaCfg config-tail fold).
critical_findings: FABRICATION + SELF-AVERAGING compound: the entire significance-is-virulence epidemiology is seeded from a value that is a near-CONSTANT in the live band. The proposal claims the rumor seed is 'cargo escrow + 6cr ransom ≈ 6M micros claimed', but in code Robbed.value_micros is the RANSOM ONLY, clamped at the cap: pirate.rs:222-241 reads `let ransom = ships.credits_micros[hrow].max(0).min(trophic.ransom_cap_micros.max(0)); ... EventKind::Robbed { ..., value_micros: ransom }` — the escrow refund goes to the corp, never into the event. With scenario_trophic's ransom_cap_micros=6_000_000 (verified scenario.rs:217-225), every robbery of a non-poor hauler seeds at exactly 6,000,000. Consequences cascade: virulence = floor 50 + 6M/10_000 = 650 milli for EVERY rumor (no minor rumors exist); gossip_major_micros=4_000_000 makes EVERY rumor 'major' (weight 3 = a uniform constant, zero discrimination); the pre-registered target shape 'a sub-major rumor dies within 1 hop' is unwitnessable because sub-major rumors cannot occur. Every rob launches the same pandemic → uniform, synchronized prey response → 'equalization one level up' — the exact contention-game/self-averaging NO-GO the grounding pack warns about ('a synchronized prey response is equalization one level up').

SHAPING LEAK / EVIDENCE-NOT-VALUATIONS violation at the seam: channel-1 puts a derived danger score INSIDE World::route_evidence. Weighting major items ×3 turns the accessor's return value from a raw rob count into a scored valuation crossing the world API boundary — exactly what the seam contract forbids ('accessors expose raw evidence, never derived danger scores', world.rs:531-541 doc; the pirate_contacts precedent is explicit: 'NEVER route_evidence counts or any derived score'). The proposal even argues the correct division of labor — 'the store carries claims; the consumer's policy assigns valence with its own constants' — then violates it by placing the valence (major threshold + weight) in the World accessor instead of the consumer. It also silently changes the signature's semantic from 'count of recent robs' to 'weighted score', which is NOT 'replacing the propagation model behind an unchanged signature'; evidence_penalty_milli in economy.rs:560-567 is calibrated against counts, and a hidden ×3 reaches the 900 clamp after 1 rob instead of 2-6.

panel_summary.scope: Cut 1 builds exactly ONE land-vector gossip channel — RouteRobbery, minted at the existing Robbed settlement site (pirate.rs:236) — carried by a hashed (truth, cover) AlertRecord ring plus bounded per-craft and per-station RumorSlot buffers, propagated by dock-contact transfer draws on a new RngStream::Media, and consumed by swapping the propagation model behind the unchanged World::route_evidence(reader, route) signature (legacy global ring remains the fallback read when the media lever is inert). The full truth/cover schema lands now (per-node claimed_route/claimed_subject/claimed_value/claimed_tick fields hashed from day one) but exactly one corruption channel is live: per-hop magnitude inflation (the big-score substrate), with identity-error and place-blur knobs present at zero. AIR at cut 1 is a documentation-only declaration (the trader contract board + price feeds are retroactively named air-mundane with a written coverage-radius sunset); no mayday channel because HaulerKilled has no generator and no responder exists. Plus: AlertMinted/RumorReachedStation chronicle events, integer knowledge-lag diagnostics in JSONL (RESULT line untouched), apply_knob arms, and a media_stakes scenario knobset (raised ransom cap / cargo values) so information can be worth a detour — a world-price change, never a reward term.
critical_findings: SELF-AVERAGING: the live per-hop inflation creates a DOUBLE positive feedback (inflation raises sig_milli which raises both transfer probability AND eviction survival), and the starting knobs are saturation-hot. An ordinary 2 cr rob starts at 700‰ per contact; inflation at 125‰/hop compounds (~6 hops = x2 claimed value = +200‰ sig), and sig clamps at 1000‰ = GUARANTEED transfer on every contact. Inflated copies also win eviction ('A 1000‰ rumor outlives a 300‰ rumor ~3.7x') and first-heard-sticks dedupe means the inflated version colonizes nodes permanently within the 4000-tick window. Endpoint: every surviving rumor trends toward max-virulence common knowledge — the 'minor stays local' regime the proposal claims as its two-regimes discriminator is systematically destroyed by its own only-upward corruption. On a 4-station map with bidirectional station-hub exchange (stations = 16-slot persistent repeaters every visitor draws against), this is the dense/accurate/global -> fully-observed dead game, the contention-game NO-GO, violating the sparse/local/lossy law.

panel_summary.scope: Cut 1 lands the media SUBSTRATE plus the SCRIPTED reader plus the console/sweep instrumentation, with the gym obs contract FROZEN ON PAPER (exact dim layout, token stride, id-code scheme, accessor signature) but NOT WIRED. The gym rider is cut 1.5 of the same rung: the 222-dim comms-log + commitment-token obs block, the Rung A deep-set/commitment-attention features extractor, PPO training, and the four pre-registered discriminators (VoI mask ablation, identity shuffle, accept-vs-value regression, act-on-rumor-vs-age). Cut 1 also makes the band changes (world config, not reward) that give information a plausibly nonzero value: 4 pirates, hideout-adjacent high-pay lane in the trader scenario template, ransom cap 6M micros. The trigger that pulls 1.5 is a designer's window read at console speed: scripted hauler_belief_scoring ON-vs-OFF income spread visibly nonzero under the new band in the sweep panel. This sequencing is a build-resource decision, not a metric gate on the game (PDR-0006-clean).
critical_findings: GHOST CHANNEL at the heart of cut 1.5: the gym world has NO gossip generator. In trader_config_template scripted ASSIGN is OFF (env.rs:483 'stagger_period: 0 // scripted ASSIGN OFF: the agent owns acceptance'), so no background craft ever accepts a contract, never goes laden, and can never be robbed. The trader is the only robbable hauler, so every Robbed event is the trader's own firsthand experience — there is nothing for word-of-mouth to tell it that it did not personally live through. The 222-dim comms-log block consumes third-party rumor traffic that the world cannot produce, and the §7 substrate asks never request background traffic.

DEAD MACHINERY + BROKEN BINDING: the commitment token is structurally absent at every decision point, and rumors cannot be bound to board slots. step_trader macro-steps until the craft is idle (accept spans the whole trip; wait starts idle), so busy==0 at every obs the policy ever sees — the commitment token's present flag '(= busy)' is always 0, the attention query ψ(zeros) is a constant, and the entire commitment-attention readout is dead weight. Worse: the base board slots carry no station identity ([present, reward, d_pickup, d_haul] only), so the rumor tokens' from/to station codes have nothing to match against at the ONLY decision surface (accept-time). D3's predicted 'negative rumor coefficient' is unlearnable via identity; only weak distance-correlation leakage remains.

PDR-0006 violation: a measurement reintroduced as a build prerequisite. 'The trigger that pulls 1.5' is a numeric separation read ('income spread visibly nonzero') — structurally the retired pattern (commit b82c20e: 'retire the presolvability gate as a build prerequisite'): prove the room is worth entering before building the player's window into it. The justifying analogy is also wrong: 'learned blindness' is sticky for persistent consumers and world-channel scripts; the gym stack retrains PPO from scratch every run (train_trader.py), so nothing 'has to be unlearned' — the true cost of a premature run is GPU hours, not corrupted capacity. D1's 'kill-criterion window' label is retired-frame vocabulary.

panel_summary.scope: Cut 1 builds the complete measurement surface for the minimal gossip epidemic (per-station reservoirs + per-craft buffers behind the unchanged `World::route_evidence(reader, route)` signature, scripted readers only): (1) ten appended integer fields on `TrophicSample` plus matching `sample_json` keys; (2) two new hash-neutral `EventKind` variants — `AlertBorn` (carrying BOTH truth and claimed payloads, the lab join) and `GossipHeard` (a first-hearing latch per node×alert) — which together constitute the truth-join run record; (3) a separate pure `media_classify(&[TrophicSample]) -> MediaReading` with five diagnosis readings and its own anchored `MEDIA` result line, leaving the existing `Verdict`/`classify()`/`RESULT` line byte-untouched; (4) a chronicle arm for craft `GossipHeard` with a printer-side magnitude filter; (5) a `--gossip-log` JSONL export for offline knowledge-front maps and the pre-registered P(escape)=1-(1-p)^visits check; (6) two designed live positive controls (media-dead must read NewsDesert; media-oracle must read CommonKnowledge) plus a labeled-synthetic unit test for every new metric (the seed-7 rule); (7) six new sweep panels in `sweep_trophic.py` including the avoidance-lag cross-correlation — the measurable prefix of the spatial boom-bust loop that cut-1 generators (pirates+haulers, no police) can support — and a reported-never-gated value-of-information panel that answers the rung-1 ablation NULL at the world level via a price-band sweep, not a default change and never a reward change.
critical_findings: SELF-AVERAGING: 'dock contact' is undefined, and the proposed stage placement inherits per-tick level-triggered semantics — transfer probability compounds to ~1.0 for any docked stay, collapsing the baseline into CommonKnowledge (the contention-game NO-GO: fully-observed, dead game).

panel_summary.scope: Cut 1 replaces the degenerate global RouteEvidence ring with the smallest real epidemiology: per-station gossip reservoirs + per-hauler bounded gossip buffers carrying robbery alerts only (the one live generator), exchanged at DOCK ONLY with deterministic P=1 transfer and significance-weighted-age eviction. The (truth, cover) schema lands complete (claimed_* fields + event_seq lab-join key) but the cover transform is the identity — no corruption, no RngStream::Media, zero new randomness. The only consumer is the existing scripted ASSIGN belief score, now read from the hauler's OWN carried buffer behind the unchanged `World::route_evidence(reader, route)` signature. Observability = one new edge-shaped event (GossipHeard) with a chronicle arm, additive JSONL keys, an offline knowledge-front join, and an informed-vs-ignorant income readout (reported, never gated). No gym change, no new air channel code (the contract board is retroactively declared the air channel), pirates stay information-blind. Two single-cause golden commits plus a stakes-calibration play sweep responding to the contact-ablation NULL.
critical_findings: DETERMINISM/HASH: `event_seq` couples HASHED state and behavior to the UNHASHED EventStream, killing the events-are-hash-neutral doctrine and making a diagnostics-class structure a behavior input.

SELF-AVERAGING / uniform global lag: re-anchoring the read window to the CURRENT tick installs a single global forgetting clock — every informed hauler drops the same alert at the same world tick (rob_tick + 4000), producing exactly the synchronized prey response the spec rejected.

synthesis.consensus_md:
# Consensus map (post-critique)

All six designs, after adversarial critique, converge on a remarkably stable skeleton. Where a critique overturned a designer's position, the consensus below reflects the post-critique state.

## The architecture (unanimous)
1. **The seam**: the gossip system replaces the propagation model strictly BEHIND the unchanged `World::route_evidence(reader: CraftId, route: usize) -> u32` signature (world.rs:495-513, the doc-named "degenerate proto-channel"). The call site (economy.rs:546-567) and the `min(robs×penalty, 900)` avoid-not-erase clamp are untouched. The accessor returns a **raw count** — the play critique's CRITICAL (major-weight ×3 inside the accessor = a valuation crossing the world API) was accepted by everyone's logic: valence lives in the consumer, claims in the store.
2. **Topology = epidemiology**: stations are reservoirs (world-level `Vec<GossipBuffer>` sized once at reset, the RouteEvidence n_stations sizing law), craft are vectors (new Option capability column on CraftStore, initialized in BOTH `push()` and the reset mint loop). Buffers are bounded; the buffer + read window are the forgetting; no decay arithmetic is ever stored.
3. **One generator, one channel**: Robbed settlements only. DrivenOff leaves no trace. No mayday/air code (no responder, and `HaulerKilled` has no emit site — grep-verified by the artifact lens). Channels live WITH their generators; most designs also adopt the two-sided extension (generator AND a consumer that can act).
4. **Victim-as-index-case seeding**: the robbed hauler's own buffer receives the hops=0 alert at settlement (stage 3b2, co-located with the existing ring write). The pirate gets no copy. "News fronts travel at ship speed" and "dead lanes carry no news" become automatic world properties, not tuned behaviors. Every critique named this the strongest single element.
5. **Dock-contact propagation, EDGE-triggered**: every design that hung exchange off the per-tick info_tick refresh loop drew a CRITICAL (substrate, lab) or pre-empted it (artifact, scope, play): the loop at world.rs:840-852 runs every tick of a dwell, compounding any transfer probability to ~1.0 — the self-averaging NO-GO rebuilt one layer up. Unanimous post-critique fix: **one exchange opportunity per dock VISIT** (edge detected from pre-refresh state), so the P(escape) = 1−(1−p)^visits law is literal.
6. **Pirates stay information-blind**: `relocate_lurk_target`'s geometry-only signature is the enforcement mechanism; the interdiction-equalizer lesson stands. Pirate displacement remains metabolic (hunger). "Prey that knows vs predator that hungers" is the watchable asymmetry. (Substrate's accidental pirate-courier side effect was flagged and is excluded; see divergence D6.)
7. **The only consumer is the scripted ASSIGN belief score** (`hauler_belief_scoring`). No in-flight detour surface is built (none exists; named cut-2+ decision surface). No new EventKind cascade; propagation is a staged world-step mechanic, never an event-handler reaction.

## Determinism landing (unanimous, letter-perfect against the recipe)
- Hashed words appended after word 29; HASH_FORMAT_VERSION 4→5; both state goldens re-pinned ONLY via `print_golden`; `manual_zero_fold` extended; per-field `moves!` completeness tests; shared `pub(crate) write_*` fold helpers used by both `state_hash` and the parity recompute.
- `MediaCfg` folded at the config tail in a SEPARATE single-cause golden commit; `apply_knob` arms for every knob; unknown knobs abort sweeps.
- `RngStream::Media` = appended enum variant with a NEW fixed salt (both substrate and artifact independently chose 0xBB67_AE85_84CA_A73B, frac(√3), continuing the frac(√2) SALT_PIRACY convention); draws only at the fixed exchange stage in dense-row/slot order; dedupe-before-draw so the cursor is a pure function of hashed state (Class-3 discipline).
- ONE master inert predicate defaulting OFF: zero Media draws, default worlds bit-identical (the engage_radius_au pattern), pinned with a cross-branch digest test, not "tests pass". Dual-gating under engage_radius_au>0 is documented, not hidden.
- A dedicated hashed monotone `alert_seq` mint counter is the alert identity / dedup key / tie-break — NOT `(tick,route)` (non-unique: multiple robs per route per tick) and NOT an EventStream index (scope's CRITICAL: hashed state must never key off the unhashed stream).
- No serde exists; gossip state is a pure function of (config, log, Media stream); replay-check on media-live runs must be bit-identical.

## Scope restraint (unanimous)
- **No gym change in cut 1**: zero obs/FFI/action/reward changes. Reward stays Δcredits; `test_robbery_debits_delta_credits_no_shaping` stays green. The media head waits (divergence D4 is about the trigger framing, not about whether).
- **Air = a declaration, not a build**: the contract board / price feeds are *proposed* as the air-mundane channel in-fiction (a spec paragraph requiring owner ratification — the artifact critique caught that this is NOT pre-existing authority); coverage radius lands with the first frontier map; maydays wait for a generator AND responder.
- **Evidence-not-valuations held everywhere under pressure**: stores carry raw ticks and claimed integers; significance/retention computed at the read/decision site; no heat, threat, or confidence fields; risk_appetite ghost stays dead.

## Observability & lab (strong majority)
- One edge-shaped "first hearing" event with a chronicle arm (the play-blindness critiques bit every design that deferred this: a rung invisible at the console cannot be play-judged, and PDR-0006 permits no other judge). Payload must be **self-contained** (route, claimed value, hops, staleness printable without joins).
- A hash-neutral truth-record event at mint (AlertBorn-shape) carrying truth AND cover — safe because events are unhashed and no agent reads them; it fixes the `route_of→None` offline-join caveat by capturing the route at the only moment it is resolvable.
- Additive JSONL keys only; the anchored RESULT line is untouched; any new MEDIA line lands lockstep with its regex in the same commit.
- Instrument-kill discipline extended to media: media-dead and media-oracle live controls (conditional on born>0 — the lab critique's zero-rob-seed fix), a labeled synthetic per metric including the quiet-but-alive StaleEcho trap (the seed-7 false-witness class), and the P(escape) analytic check with k = dock-visit edges.
- A paired ecosystem reading (legacy-read vs gossip-read verdict distributions, same seeds, REPORTED) — the artifact critique's point that the swap touches the documented load-bearing desync mechanism and the cycle's survival must be watched.

## The stakes response to the ablation NULL (unanimous in substance)
The NULL is real and recorded (`runs/pirates_ablation.log`: contact-aware 1.620±1.745 vs zero-masked 1.800±1.898 Δcredits/ep on held-out seeds; delta −0.180; per-decision robbery costs ~2-20 cr) — though two critiques correctly noted it was never promoted into a committed lab note, which should happen first. All six designs answer it the same lawful way: **world prices, never reward terms** — raise robbery stakes (ransom cap, contract reward spread) as a SWEEP BAND first, watch the rung-1 verdict panel so the boom-bust cycle survives, and let the owner re-bake defaults from readings at the console. Note the band fact the gym critique surfaced: `scenario_trophic` already bakes ransom_cap 6M while `TrophicCfg::default` is 2M — any probe must run in the same band as the world it claims to speak for.

## What cut 1 honestly closes
The hauler-information half plus the metabolic pirate half of the owner's boom-bust loop: robbery → victim carries news → gossip front → belief-scored ASSIGN drains the hot route → pirates starve/relocate (existing machinery) → rumors age out per-reader → haulers return. Information *displacing pirates* and prey-gossip *attracting* them wait for police and for owner-gated pirate reads.

divergences.topic: Cover corruption in cut 1: nothing live vs magnitude-inflation live vs identity decay too
divergences.positions: LAB and SCOPE: propagation-only — cover==truth, the (truth,cover) schema lands but the transform is identity; validate one new instrument at a time; corruption waits for cut 2 ('the big-score wrinkle is meaningless until someone learns skepticism from it'). PLAY and ARTIFACT: magnitude inflation live, identifiers true — the artifact lens proved the selection logic (the sole consumer counts route-matched alerts and never reads magnitude, so inflation corrupts only reach/retention and is consumer-immune), and play's exaggerated-score arc ('the lane stays empty longer than the true loss warranted') is real watchable texture. SUBSTRATE and GYM: identity decay / id-swap live too. Critique evidence: substrate's identity decay drew a MAJOR (ghost channel — claimed_pirate_slot read by nothing; a divergence nobody can be deceived by is dead freight spending real draws); artifact's inflation drew a CRITICAL (double positive feedback: inflation→sig→transfer AND eviction survival→more hops→more inflation, driving common knowledge at the stated knobs) — fixable by hop-attenuated transmission; play's inflation arithmetic was built on a fabricated seed value (Robbed.value_micros is the wallet-clamped ransom, near-constant 6M in the band — verified in pirate.rs), fixed by seeding from the robbed contract's reward_micros, which has real tier variance (verified in scenario.rs).
divergences.recommendation: Inflation-only, live, with the loop damped: seed claimed_value from contract reward + ransom paid (real variance), inflate only on retellings (hops≥2), cap the claim, and damp transfer by a per-hop loss factor so the per-hop net factor on transfer probability is <1 by arithmetic (at inflation 125‰ × hop_loss 150‰: 1.125×0.85≈0.956). Identity stays TRUE (pirate_slot is a real claim the chronicle prints — a consumer); the decay knob is NOT shipped at zero (deferred means not built, per the artifact critique). This keeps the big-score substrate generating distributional texture while every consumer is provably immune to the lie, and the lab join stays exact via alert_seq.

divergences.topic: Transfer model: significance-proportional probability (RngStream::Media now) vs deterministic P=1 (no new randomness at all)
divergences.positions: SCOPE alone: P=1 union-merge, zero new RNG — 'with exactly one alert class, a stochastic transfer probability adds noise, not structure'; significance-P earns entry when a second, lower-significance alert class exists. Everyone else: significance-proportional transfer on RngStream::Media (major≈1.0, minor small — the owner's epidemiology authority verbatim). Critique evidence cuts BOTH ways: scope's P=1 drew a MAJOR (lossless field — at rung-1 rob rates, 16/32-slot buffers rarely fill, eviction never bites, hubs converge every docker to identical buffers, and the 'two regimes' shape is untestable); but the stochastic designs' significance functions were ALL calibrated against the wrong seed (near-constant ransom), which would have made scope's 'noise not structure' point empirically true as-shipped.
divergences.recommendation: Significance-P with RngStream::Media in cut 1 — scope's premise (no significance variance) dissolves once the seed moves to contract reward (tiers give real spread), and the LOSSY leg is a law that must bite somewhere: stochastic per-visit transfer is the loss mechanism that actually fires at rung-1 rob rates, where eviction demonstrably won't. Re-derive the sig knobs from the measured reward distribution so P spans (0,1) across tiers before pinning the band, and pre-register alerts_evicted + station-content divergence windows so a lossless field is visible if it happens anyway.

divergences.topic: RouteEvidence ring retirement: now (cut 1) vs named cut-2 sunset vs indefinite fallback
divergences.positions: SCOPE: retire NOW (commit B, v5→v6) — the ring was spec-documented as the degenerate proto-channel with this cut as its due date; keeping unread hashed state mints a second risk_appetite ghost; old behavior is one git checkout away. SUBSTRATE/PLAY/ARTIFACT: keep as the media-off fallback with a named cut-2/3 sunset. Critique evidence: scope's retire-now drew a MAJOR (belief_scoring=true + media-off configs — the rung-1 play configuration — silently read permanent zero, a behavior regression invisible to the inertness test); substrate's sunset trigger ('gossip-mode verdict parity') drew a MAJOR as incoherent AND gate-smelling (gossip exists to CHANGE the verdicts; conditioning a build step on a verdict-distribution comparison is the retired compulsion); artifact's 'validated as load-bearing' phrasing drew the same gate-smell MINOR.
divergences.recommendation: Keep the ring as the media-off fallback in cut 1; retire it (with the word-29 fold, the info_tick evidence-read path, AND the risk_appetite ghost bundled into the same scheduled format bump) in cut 2's state-shape commit, triggered by two honest halves: (a) media-off behavior preservation proven by the cap=0 digest control (refactor correctness, not a game gate) and (b) an OWNER play judgment at the console, recorded as a PDR. No verdict-parity requirement anywhere. Add reset-time validation so belief_scoring=true with no live evidence path is a hard error, never a silent zero.

divergences.topic: Gym sequencing: obs contract frozen + wired as cut 1.5 of this rung vs console-only cut 1 with the gym a later, separately-decided rung
divergences.positions: GYM lens: freeze the full 256-dim obs contract now, wire and train as cut 1.5 of the SAME rung, pulled by a scripted ON/OFF income-spread read. All other lenses: console/heuristic-only cut 1; the media head waits for a demonstrated scripted information-income gap. Critique evidence against cut-1.5-as-written is decisive: three CRITICALs — (1) the gym world has NO gossip generator (scripted ASSIGN off ⇒ the trader is the only robbable hauler; the comms log can only echo its own robberies); (2) the commitment token is structurally always-absent at decision time (busy==0 at every macro-step obs) and board slots carry no station identity, so the rumor→decision binding doesn't exist; (3) the 1.5 'trigger' is a measurement reintroduced as a build prerequisite — the retired PDR-0006 pattern. Plus a MAJOR probe/world mismatch (sweep probes scenario_trophic at ransom 6M; the gym template hardcodes 2M defaults).
divergences.recommendation: Console-only cut 1. Bank the genuinely excellent gym artifacts as a frozen-on-paper appendix — token stride, raw log-age encoding, stateless per-episode entity codes, masked-absent φ discipline, D0-D4 discriminator suite — but REVISED per the critiques (background scripted haulers + per-craft scripted:false flag for the agent; station entity codes on board slots; per-board-slot attention queries; commitment token dropped until the detour verb). The gym wiring is a plain sequencing call made when the substrate lands and a band iteration has been run, with the scripted ON/OFF spread REPORTED alongside whatever training shows — never a numeric pull-trigger.

divergences.topic: Lab surface: separate MediaReading classifier + anchored MEDIA line now vs JSONL-only with offline joins, classifier later
divergences.positions: LAB: ship media_classify (NoMedia/NewsDesert/StaleEcho/CommonKnowledge/Localized) + a second anchored MEDIA result line + MEDIA_RE in lockstep, leaving classify()/Verdict/RESULT byte-untouched — the controls need a binary reading to assert against. SCOPE/SUBSTRATE: JSONL keys + offline gossip-log joins only; any reading vocabulary waits until cut-1 panel shapes are known ('promotion to a media verdict arm waits'). PLAY: middle position — a single reported media_dead boolean. Critique evidence: lab's classifier survived critique structurally (the separation protects the validated Verdict instrument and the precedence vocabulary correctly transplants the PermanentPeace lesson) but needed fixes (controls misfire on zero-rob seeds; StaleEcho false-positive risk; escaped_milli div-by-zero); nobody found the classifier itself to be over-build.
divergences.recommendation: Ship lab's separate classifier with the critique fixes (born>0 conditioning, the quiet-but-alive trap synthetic, sentinel at born==0). It is additive, never touches RESULT_RE, and the M-DEAD/M-ORACLE controls are toothless without a categorical reading to assert. The integration into Verdict/classify() stays deferred until the two instruments are observed to co-vary.

divergences.topic: Pirates in the gossip network: buffer-carrying couriers vs excluded entirely
divergences.positions: SUBSTRATE: every craft carries a buffer, pirates included 'as mute carriers' — but its critique showed the exchange as specified is symmetric (pirates would UPLOAD news of their own robberies between stations), an accidental unstated mechanic drawing real Media randomness, contradicting the design's own text. PLAY/ARTIFACT/SCOPE: pirates get no buffer at all (None column; 'a pirate buffer column for a channel pirates may not read is dead state'). The substrate critique itself conceded the pirate-courier is 'arguably delightful fiction' but must be decided on purpose, either way.
divergences.recommendation: Exclude in cut 1: gossip column is None for Pirate-role craft and the exchange has a role filter. The pirate-who-carried-the-story-of-his-own-heist is named in the deferred ladder as a deliberate future mechanic with its own chronicle read — shipped on purpose or not at all.

synthesis.recommended_cut1_md:
# Media Rung Cut 1 — "News Travels at Ship Speed" (synthesized design)

## 0. Frame and the play bar

Cut 1 is judged at the console by one arc (PDR-0006 — the play it produces is the only judge): **a robbery becomes a story that travels at ship speed; the story drains a lane at different times for different haulers depending on where they have docked; the silence starves the pirate; the rumor ages out per-reader and traffic returns.** Pre-registered watchable shapes (windows, never gates): (1) staggered `GossipHeard` chronicle lines ordered by lane distance from the victim's first dock; (2) per-hauler accept divergence on the hot route — informed avoid, ignorant walk in; (3) two regimes from one mechanism — big claims approach common knowledge, minor robs stay local; (4) dead lanes carry no news. Cut 1 closes the hauler-information half + the metabolic pirate half of the boom-bust loop; the police half waits for police.

Everything below is hashed, integer, bounded, reset-sized, inert by default, and a pure function of (config, command log, Media stream).

## 1. Data structures (hashed)

```rust
// crates/jumpgate-core/src/media.rs (new module)

/// One rumor as held by one node — the COVER. Truth lives in the run record
/// (Robbed + AlertBorn events, joined on alert_seq). EVIDENCE ONLY: raw ticks
/// and claimed integers; significance/staleness computed at the read, never
/// stored. No heat, threat, or confidence fields — ever.
pub struct GossipAlert {
    pub alert_seq: u32,             // hashed world mint counter — identity, dedup key, eviction tie-break, lab join key
    pub route: u32,                 // claimed directed route, from_row*n_stations+to_row (TRUE in cut 1)
    pub pirate_slot: u32,           // claimed perpetrator CraftId.slot (TRUE in cut 1; corruption = cut 2 with its consumer)
    pub rob_tick: Tick,             // claimed when (TRUE in cut 1)
    pub claimed_value_micros: i64,  // the ONLY mutating field — seeded from true loss, inflates on retellings
    pub first_heard: Tick,          // when THIS node acquired this copy (raw; the per-reader staleness anchor)
    pub hops: u8,                   // saturating; 0 = the victim's own copy
}

pub struct GossipBuffer { pub slots: Vec<Option<GossipAlert>> } // cap from config, fixed at reset
```

Placement:
- `World::station_gossip: Vec<GossipBuffer>` — len n_stations, sized ONCE at reset (RouteEvidence sizing law, world.rs:323-331), empty-slot init.
- `CraftStore::gossip: Vec<Option<GossipBuffer>>` — `Some(empty)` for **Hauler-role craft only** when media is live; `None` for pirates (information-blind by construction; `relocate_lurk_target`'s geometry-only signature untouched) and `None` everywhere when media is off. Initialized in BOTH `CraftStore::push` and `World::reset`'s mint loop (push takes the cap, mirroring how role-shaped Option columns init), length-parallel slot==row.
- `World::next_alert_seq: u32` — hashed mint counter, 0 at reset.

Unhashed diagnostics class (the engagement_diag pattern, never a behavior input): `World::media_diag { evictions: u64 }` — eviction accounting stays out of golden discipline (lab-critique resolution).

## 2. Significance and the damped corruption loop

```rust
/// milli (0..=1000), computed at the read — never stored.
fn sig_milli(claimed_value_micros: i64, cfg: &MediaCfg) -> u32 {
    ((claimed_value_micros / cfg.sig_divisor_micros) + cfg.sig_floor_milli as i64)
        .clamp(cfg.sig_floor_milli as i64, 1000) as u32
}
/// Effective transfer P, hop-attenuated (integer pow, saturating):
/// p_milli = sig_milli * (1000 - hop_loss_milli)^hops / 1000^hops
```

**Seed honesty (verified in code)**: `Robbed.value_micros` is the wallet-clamped RANSOM — near-constant 6M in the trophic band — so it must NOT seed significance (the play critique's confirmed CRITICAL). The seed is the victim's true loss available in hand at settlement: **robbed contract `reward_micros` + ransom actually paid**. Contract tiers (qty 5/10/15 × tier multipliers, scenario.rs) give real variance, so transfer P genuinely spans (0,1) and the minor-rumor-dies arc is witnessable.

**The double-feedback loop is damped by arithmetic** (artifact critique's CRITICAL): inflation only on retellings (hops≥2), at `inflation_milli=125` against `hop_loss_milli=150`, the per-hop net factor on transfer probability is 1.125×0.85 ≈ 0.956 < 1 — monotone decay; the telephone game pays a distance tax no matter how big the claim grows. Claim saturates at `claimed_value_cap_micros`. Knob starting values are explicitly **re-derived from the measured band reward distribution at console before pinning** — worked points against the real tier spread, not invented.

## 3. Generation (stage 3b2, inside `resolve_encounters` settlement)

At a Robbed settlement, co-located with the existing evidence-ring write (pirate.rs:188-209), no draws:
1. Mint `alert_seq` (dense pirate-row order at a fixed stage ⇒ deterministic).
2. Push `GossipAlert { route, pirate_slot, rob_tick: now, claimed_value: contract_reward + ransom_paid, first_heard: now, hops: 0 }` into the **victim's** buffer. Cover == truth at hop 0.
3. **Origin-pier deposit** (scope critique's MAJOR fix): if the victim is currently within ARRIVAL_RADIUS of a station (the documented phase-0 origin-dock-ambush mode), deposit a copy (hops 1, no inflation — firsthand report) into that station's reservoir same tick. Without this, the edge-trigger never re-fires for the dominant robbery class and the pier never hears about the robbery on its own doorstep. Other docked craft still hear no earlier than their next dock edge.
4. Emit `AlertBorn` (§7). DrivenOff writes and emits nothing.

## 4. Propagation: edge-triggered dock exchange (stage 3b2, before encounters)

Internal order of the existing gated 3b2 block, declared in-place per convention:
(i) resolve `station_pos`; (ii) **dock-edge detection → exchanges → info_tick refresh**; (iii) `resolve_encounters`. 3b-before-3b2 is untouched (destination-dock sanctuary preserved); a robbery this tick propagates to non-victims no earlier than their next dock edge.

- **Edge predicate** (artifact critique's MAJOR fix): computed during the same arrival-radius scan **reading the pre-refresh `info_tick`** — a craft is on a dock edge iff it is within ARRIVAL_RADIUS this tick AND its pre-refresh info_tick shows it was not docked last tick. Zero new state. Pinned with the unit test: *a craft parked N ticks produces exactly ONE exchange.* Oscillation across the radius re-fires; harmless (dedupe is idempotent), documented.
- **Partner**: the LOWEST station row within radius (explicit deterministic rule). **Role filter**: Hauler-role craft only — pirates neither upload nor download (divergence D6 resolved: no accidental pirate couriers).
- **Direction order pinned**: ship→station uploads (sender slot order), then station→ship downloads (sender slot order); documented + unit-tested (play critique's determinism MINOR).
- Per candidate item: (1) **dedupe first** — receiver holds `alert_seq` ⇒ skip, NO draw (draw count = pure function of hashed membership); (2) ONE `RngStream::Media` draw: transfer iff `u % 1000 < p_milli` (hop-attenuated sig, §2); (3) on transfer, receiver copy gets `hops+1` (saturating), `first_heard = now`, and — iff resulting hops ≥ 2 — deterministic inflation `claimed = min(claimed×(1000+inflation_milli)/1000, cap)`. Sender untouched; first-heard sticks; re-hearing never re-inflates (dedupe kills the evict-replant ratchet at the same node within retention).
- Bounded cost: ≤ (station_slots + craft_slots) draws per dock edge, only for craft on an edge.

## 5. Eviction (deterministic total order, no draws)

Insert algorithm: (a) lowest-index empty slot; (b) else any slot whose item has `(now − first_heard) > trophic.evidence_window` is reclaimable space — **forgetting has one owner, the read window**; eviction is purely overflow (play critique's dead-forgetting fix); (c) else `priority = rob_tick.0 + claimed_value_micros × value_ticks_milli / 1_000_000` (i64): evict argmin iff incoming priority exceeds it, else DROP incoming; ties evict lowest `alert_seq`. Unit tests: total order, tie case, evict-replant cycle.

## 6. The read: `route_evidence` swapped behind its signature

```rust
pub fn route_evidence(&self, reader: CraftId, route: usize) -> u32 {
    if media_live { count of reader's OWN buffer items with item.route == route
                    && (tick - item.first_heard) <= trophic.evidence_window }   // RAW count
    else          { legacy ring + reader's info_tick — byte-identical }
}
```

- **Raw count, zero weighting** (play critique's CRITICAL): semantics preserved ('count of recent robs'); valence stays in the consumer with `evidence_penalty_milli`; the 900 clamp's avoid-not-erase calibration is untouched.
- **Per-reader forgetting clock** (scope critique's CRITICAL): staleness anchors on `first_heard` at THIS node, never the global tick against rob_tick — each hauler forgets on its own acquisition clock, so the return to a cooled route staggers exactly as the avoidance did. No synchronized global expiry; the documented "desynchronize by lived docking rhythms" property is preserved and sharpened (per-craft *content*, not just per-craft staleness).
- `info_tick` keeps refreshing (dock detector); its evidence-read role ends when media is live.
- **Config validation at reset** (BadEconomyRef precedent): `hauler_belief_scoring=true` with no live evidence path = hard error; exactly one of {station,craft} caps > 0 (half-on) = hard error.

## 7. Events and chronicle (hash-neutral)

- **`AlertBorn { alert_seq, route, pirate, hauler, truth_value_micros, claimed_value_micros }`** at mint — the truth join, capturing the route at the only moment event↔route↔subjects are simultaneously resolvable (fixes `route_of→None`). No chronicle arm (it shadows Robbed).
- **`GossipHeard { carrier: GossipNode{Station|Craft}, alert_seq, route, pirate_slot, claimed_value_micros, hops, rob_tick }`** — latched on FIRST insertion per (node, alert); the victim's own hops-0 seed does NOT emit (Robbed tells that story). **Self-contained payload** so the chronicle prints without joins (lab/scope critique fix): "heard: route 2→0 robbed by P7 (claimed 7.1cr, 3 hops, 1,900 ticks stale)". `chronicle_subject` arm for Craft carriers only (chronicle is craft-grouped; station hearings feed the gossip log/panels; a station-thread chronicle is a named deferral). Printer-side `--chronicle-gossip-min-micros` filter (default print-all; owner tunes at console). Volume bounded by the latch (alerts × nodes); measured in the first console session.

## 8. Lab bench (windows, never gates)

- **TrophicSample additive integer fields** (half-open (window_start, tick] convention; JSONL keys additive; RESULT line untouched): `gossip_born`, `gossip_first_heard`, `alerts_carried`, `stations_with_news`, `per_station_alerts: Vec<u32>` (the news-desert map — the play critique's station-identity fix), `per_station_contacts: Vec<u32>` (dock EDGES per window — the P(escape) denominator with k's unit fixed), `heard_lag_ticks: Vec<u32>` + `heard_hops: Vec<u32>` (per first-hearing, the engagement_phase_milli pattern). Evictions ride the unhashed `media_diag` counter into JSONL.
- **`media_classify(&[TrophicSample]) -> MediaReading`** — separate pure classifier, Verdict/classify()/RESULT byte-untouched: `NoMedia` (born==0), `NewsDesert` (born>0, zero hops≥1 hearings), `StaleEcho` (births first half, zero second half while held-alerts stay high AND robs continue — the PermanentPeace analogue), `CommonKnowledge` (run-aggregate escape ≥ 950‰ AND final coverage complete — the self-averaging alarm on a baseline arm), `Localized` (the alive reading). Anchored `MEDIA seed=… born=… escaped_milli=… median_lag=… p90_lag=… reading=…` line + `MEDIA_RE` in `sweep_trophic.py`, SAME commit (lockstep rule). `escaped_milli=0` sentinel at born==0. Synthetic battery per reading including the quiet-but-alive StaleEcho trap.
- **Controls** (instrument-kill discipline; all assertions conditional on born>0 — lab critique fix): `media_default_is_inert` (default config: zero Media draws + cross-branch event-digest equality with pre-media HEAD); **M-DEAD** (sig forced 0) must read NewsDesert; **M-ORACLE** (p=1000, huge caps/window) must read CommonKnowledge; **deaf control** (media live, belief OFF) must be element-identical to belief-off baseline on the pre-registered behavioral trace (per-window traffic/accepts/robs/per-craft credits — NOT state_hash, which legitimately differs).
- **Panels**: knowledge-front (lag histograms in raw ticks, median/p90, lag-vs-hops); news-geography (hub/backwater ratio); bimodal reach by claimed-value quartile; **saturation window** (fraction of live alerts held by >800‰ of craft, with a pre-registered expected band at defaults, not only at the extreme); P(escape)=1−(1−p)^k per-visit analytic check; **avoidance-lag at EVENT resolution** from `--gossip-log` + ContractAccepted ticks (the 2000-tick windowed cross-correlation is demoted to a coarse view — the power-check MAJOR); **paired ecosystem reading** — same seed grid, legacy-read vs gossip-read, verdict distributions REPORTED side by side (does the cycle survive the swap); **value-of-information panel** — media-live vs media-dead, BOTH arms `hauler_belief_scoring=true` (the ghost-consumer fix), across the stakes band, eval_pirates_ablation header verbatim: reported, never gated. A ~0 reading is a finding that points the next bet at world prices — owner's call, no kill-criterion vocabulary anywhere.

## 9. Stakes (the world-price answer to the recorded NULL)

The NULL is real (`runs/pirates_ablation.log`: aware 1.620±1.745 vs masked 1.800±1.898; delta −0.180; per-decision robbery costs ~2–20 cr). **Step 0 of the build: promote those numbers into a committed lab note** (two critiques correctly flagged the missing provenance). Cut 1's response: a `media_stakes` SWEEP knobset on existing world knobs — ransom_cap (note `scenario_trophic` already bakes 6M vs the 2M TrophicCfg default; unify the statement of the band), contract reward spread widened — targeting "one robbery ≈ 3–5 trips' net profit" as a shape to recognize. Every stakes run keeps the rung-1 verdict panel live (higher ransoms feed pirate metabolism; the boom-bust band was console-baked). Defaults change only by owner decision after readings (OD-1). Reward stays Δcredits; no shaping anywhere.

owner_decision_points.question: Stakes re-pricing: the recorded contact-ablation NULL says robbery is too cheap (~2-20 cr/decision) for any risk information to matter. The fix is world prices (ransom cap, contract reward spread) — but the current band (ransom 6cr/upkeep 12) was console-tuned by you in rung 1, and higher ransoms also feed pirate metabolism, perturbing the boom-bust cycle. Does cut 1 ship the media_stakes band as a sweep axis with you re-baking defaults only after console readings, or do defaults change now?
options: Sweep knobset now; owner re-bakes defaults after a console session reading the VoI panel and the rung-1 verdict panel together (recommended — all six designers converged here)
Re-bake defaults immediately as part of the media rung (one-way change to the landed pirates-rung calibration before the instrument can read it)
Hold prices fixed and let cut 1 demonstrate propagation alone (accepts that the value-of-information readout will likely be ~0 and the play arc faint)
owner_decision_points.recommendation: Sweep knobset now. Which price makes information load-bearing is exactly what the new instrument exists to show; changing defaults before it can read the change inverts the lab, and shipping no stakes lever risks reading the mechanism as dead when the prices are. World mechanic, reported never gated, reward stays delta-credits.

owner_decision_points.question: RouteEvidence ring sunset: the global ring (hash word 29) was documented as 'the degenerate proto-channel' with media as its replacement. When does it retire — and what is the trigger, given that the originally proposed 'verdict parity' trigger was found incoherent (gossip exists to change the verdicts) and gate-smelling?
options: Retire in cut 2's scheduled format bump, triggered by (a) media-off behavior preservation proven via the cap=0 digest control AND (b) your play judgment at the console that the gossip path is the one worth keeping, recorded as a PDR; bundle the risk_appetite ghost removal into the same bump (recommended)
Retire now in cut 1 (scope lens) — no fallback; requires accepting that rung-1 belief-scored configs need media on, enforced by a reset validation error
Keep dual-mode indefinitely as a permanent cheap baseline (the lingering-abstraction the fleet-ledger caveat forbids)
owner_decision_points.recommendation: Cut-2 retirement on owner play judgment + media-off preservation. It keeps the only clean A/B between degenerate and real propagation alive while the mechanism is calibrated, has no metric gate anywhere, names the debt with a concrete trigger, and the same scheduled bump cleans up the risk_appetite ghost for free.

owner_decision_points.question: Cover corruption scope for cut 1 — an in-fiction commitment about what land gossip can lie about: magnitude inflation live (where and when reliable, how big is not), nothing live (pure lossy/laggy truth), or identity corruption too?
options: Inflation-only, live, loop-damped (recommended): claims inflate on retellings, identifiers and routes stay true; the sole consumer counts route-matched alerts and is provably immune to the lie, so the big-score heavy tail starts generating texture with zero ghost-channel risk
Nothing live (lab/scope position): cover==truth, validate the propagation instrument alone this cut; corruption lands cut 2 against a trusted baseline

Inflation + identity decay now (substrate/gym position): exercises the full (truth,cover) machinery — but identity corruption has no consumer until a learner or heat system can be deceived by it (critiqued as dead freight spending real draws)
owner_decision_points.recommendation: Inflation-only. It is the unique corruption the cut-1 consumer cannot be misled by, it feeds propagation physics (a real consumer), and the damping arithmetic is pre-registered. Identity stays a TRUE claim the chronicle prints; its corruption arrives with the first thing that can be deceived. If you prefer maximum instrument caution, option 2 costs one knob and loses one cut of distributional texture — a legitimate conservative call.

owner_decision_points.question: Gym sequencing: does the DRL media head ride this rung at all? The gym lens proposed a frozen obs contract now + wiring as 'cut 1.5' pulled by a scripted income-spread trigger; critique found the gym world currently has no gossip generator, the commitment-token attention is structurally dead at decision time, and the numeric pull-trigger is the retired gate pattern.
options: Console-only cut 1; the obs contract (revised per critique: background scripted haulers, station codes on board slots, per-board-slot queries, commitment token dropped until the detour verb) is banked as a frozen paper appendix; gym wiring is a plain sequencing decision you make after the band session, with the scripted ON/OFF spread reported alongside (recommended)
Wire and train the gym in the same rung regardless of band readings (spends GPU against a band the NULL already showed is information-flat, and requires the gym-world generator fixes immediately)
No paper contract either — design the obs block from scratch when the gym rung arrives (risks the substrate not exporting what the head needs: first_heard, hops, cover payloads, stable ids)
owner_decision_points.recommendation: Option 1. The substrate exports everything the frozen contract needs (it shaped the GossipAlert fields), the appendix costs nothing, and the wiring decision stays a build-resource call you make with band readings in hand — informed by numbers, never decided by one.

owner_decision_points.question: Two ratifications of media fiction/law: (a) declare the existing contract board and price feeds retroactively as the AIR-mundane channel (zero code; coverage radius lands with the first frontier map as the named sunset) — the artifact critique established this is a PROPOSAL needing your sign-off, not existing authority; (b) harden 'channels live WITH their generators' into the two-sided rule 'generators AND a consumer that can act' (used to defer the mayday and DrivenOff channels).
options: Ratify both (recommended): the declaration banks the air/land bimodality firewall as standing fiction for a spec paragraph; the two-sided rule prevents unread channels teaching sticky learned blindness, with named pull-in triggers for mayday/DrivenOff
Ratify the air declaration only; keep channel go-live case-by-case
Ratify neither; leave the board's in-fiction status undefined (schema-rot risk for the AIR/LAND table cut-2 designers inherit)
owner_decision_points.recommendation: Ratify both. An unread channel is worse than a missing one, and the air declaration costs a paragraph while foreclosing nothing — the 4-station map is one coverage zone, so today's global board is already correct behavior under the declared fiction.

owner_decision_points.question: Pirates stay information-blind through cuts 1-2 (no gossip buffers, no reads; the geometry-only relocate_lurk_target signature remains the compile-level enforcement), with pirate-side participation arriving only as a deliberate owner-gated arc?
options: Blind (recommended, unanimous post-critique): the interdiction-RL lesson says information-chasing pirates self-equalize risk and destroy the heterogeneity that makes hauler information valuable; prey-that-knows vs predator-that-hungers is the watchable asymmetry; the pirate-courier wrinkle is named in the deferred ladder to be shipped on purpose or not at all
Pirates as mute couriers now (carry buffers, never read) — delightful fiction but an extra mechanic drawing Media randomness with no designed read
Pirates read prey/rival gossip now — reverses a hard-won empirical NO-GO with no design around it
owner_decision_points.recommendation: Blind. Routing information into pirate behavior is a whole designed arc (value-seeking, fencing, prey selection), not a column read; every panel that touched it converged here, and the signature stays the enforcement mechanism.
